name: Composer of Strands - Gaia World Spam (Shroud Psionic)
description: A tall psionic empire focused on making a covenant with the Composer of Strands shroud patron. Rush 800 attunement, complete Psionic Ascension, then spam Gaia worlds using the Transformation power (once per decade). Stay in 1 system or small constellation and fill it with small Gaia worlds. Easily defensible, scales through quality over quantity. Roleplay as nature druids with spiritual communion and purple vines everywhere.

strategy.core_mechanic: Composer of Strands patron provides Transformation power: Once per decade, terraform ANY uninhabitable planet/moon into a small Gaia world. Combined with Life Seeded origin (size 30 Gaia capital + Gaia preference), you create a tall empire of multiple perfect Gaia worlds within one constellation.
strategy.opening: 1. Choose Composer of Strands as shroud domain immediately. 2. Assign envoys to improve attunement ASAP. 3. Do Calling tasks to farm more attunement. 4. DO NOT EXPAND beyond starting constellation (or even stay in 1 system!). 5. Rush 800 attunement as fast as possible.
strategy.mid_game: Once at 800 attunement: Add Shrouded Vegetation blockers to capital (up to limit) to farm unity from Environmentalist civic (+unity from natural blockers). Focus FULLY on rushing Psionic Ascension path (Mind Over Matter → Transcendence).
strategy.late_game: After covenant with Composer: Use Transformation power every 10 years to convert rocky moons/planets into Gaia worlds. Sol system guarantees many rocky bodies. Colonize all of them. Stay tall with perfect 100% habitability on every world. Easily defensible (1 constellation = 1-2 choke points).
strategy.system_choice: Sol system MANDATORY - Guarantees many rocky moons and planets for Transformation conversion. DO NOT expand wide - keep small and tall.
strategy.why_it_works: Life Seeded gives Gaia Preference (+100% habitability on Gaia) and size 30 capital. Composer's Transformation creates unlimited Gaia worlds. Environmentalist + Shrouded Vegetation = massive unity. Tall empire = easy defense, high planet quality. One Gaia planet > three normal planets in output.

dlcs: possibly Overlord for Shroud patron mechanics
difficulty: Medium - Requires understanding Shroud mechanics and attunement farming
notes: This is a roleplay-focused build: druids worshipping life/fertility with purple vines overtaking everything. MULTIPLAYER: Weak (games too short to expand Gaia spam). SINGLE PLAYER: Strong (all the time needed). Very thematic and fun for nature/spiritual empire fantasy.
